proof:
calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _
failed_attempts:
calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith

calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by rw [show y = y - x + x by ring]
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ δ + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right δle1 _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by bound

calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith

calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by linarith

calc |y| = |y - x + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by linarith [hy, δle1]

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
       _   ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
       _   ≤ 1 + |x|       := by linarith
       _   = |x| + 1       := by ring

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
       _   ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
       _   ≤ 1 + |x|       := by linarith
successful_attempts:
calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

calc |y| = |x + (y - x)| := by ring_nf
       _   ≤ |x| + |y - x| := abs_add _ _
       _   ≤ |x| + 1       := add_le_add_left (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add_le _ _
    _ ≤ δ + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right δle1 _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

rw [← sub_add_cancel y x]
  apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  linarith [hy, δle1]

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
       _   ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
       _   ≤ δ + |x|       := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _
       _   ≤ 1 + |x|       := add_le_add_right δle1 _
       _   = |x| + 1       := by ring

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

calc

    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ δ + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right δle1 _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

  _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by linarith [hy, δle1]

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by linarith [hy, δle1]

    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x|      := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ δ + |x|            := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _
    _ ≤ 1 + |x|            := add_le_add_right δle1 _

    _ ≤ δ + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring

       _   ≤ 1 + |x|       := add_le_add_right δle1 _

calc |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
  _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right (le_trans (le_of_lt hy) δle1) _
  _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

apply le_of_lt
  calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := abs_add _ _
    _ < 1 + |x| := add_lt_add_right (lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1) _
    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _

    _ = |x| + 1 := add_comm _ _
